sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70815" key="nhxale/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νηχᾰλέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70815.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">νηκτός, φύσις</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.1</biblScope></bibl>, cf.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
